description: Jackie Hunt was an Executive Director of Prudential plc and the Chief Executive of Prudential UK, Europe and Africa until late 2015. She joined Prudential from Standard Life plc where she was Group Chief Financial Officer. Prior to this, Jackie held a number of senior management positions in companies including Norwich Union Insurance, Aviva, Hibernian Group, RSA Insurance and PricewaterhouseCoopers. Jackie is Deputy Chair of the FCA Practitioner Panel. She has acted as an independent non-executive director of The CityUK, a member of the ABI Board and as the Senior Independent Director of National Express Group plc.

details.body:
Jackie Hunt was an Executive Director of Prudential plc and the Chief Executive of Prudential UK, Europe and Africa until late 2015. She joined Prudential from Standard Life plc where she was Group Chief Financial Officer. Prior to this, Jackie held a number of senior management positions in companies including Norwich Union Insurance, Aviva, Hibernian Group, RSA Insurance and PricewaterhouseCoopers.

Jackie is Deputy Chair of the FCA Practitioner Panel. She has acted as an independent non-executive director of The CityUK, a member of the ABI Board and as the Senior Independent Director of National Express Group plc.

Jackie Hunt was an Executive Director of Prudential plc and the Chief Executive of Prudential UK, Europe and Africa until late 2015. She joined Prudential from Standard Life plc where she was Group Chief Financial Officer. Prior to this, Jackie held a number of senior management positions in companies including Norwich Union Insurance, Aviva, Hibernian Group, RSA Insurance and PricewaterhouseCoopers.

Jackie is Deputy Chair of the FCA Practitioner Panel. She has acted as an independent non-executive director of The CityUK, a member of the ABI Board and as the Senior Independent Director of National Express Group plc.
Commissioners support the Chair in meeting the terms of reference for the Independent Dormant Assets Commission.

title: Jackie Hunt
